channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Cease-Fire with Iran Faces Challenges
item.description: Early signs suggest a potential return to conflict may be emerging.

item.title: America First Institute Sues California Over Sanctuary Policies
item.description: A federal lawsuit was filed against California's Attorney General by the America First Policy Institute, representing El Cajon.

item.title: Giuliani Hospitalized for Lung Illness Linked to Ground Zero
item.description: Former New York Mayor Rudy Giuliani is hospitalized with pneumonia, reportedly stemming from his work after the September 11 attacks.

item.title: Trump Claims U.S. Military Engaged Iranian Boats
item.description: President Trump stated Monday the U.S. military engaged seven Iranian boats, requesting South Korea's assistance in reopening the Strait of Hormuz.
